data.description:
The setup CLI currently replaces configuration settings entirely rather than preserving existing values. When users make incremental changes—such as adding a new model or dispatch configuration—the CLI erases all unrelated configurations. This forces users to reconfigure everything from scratch.

The setup CLI should preserve existing configurations during updates: users should see their current selections, be able to keep them by default, and only modify the specific setting they intend to change. For example, adding a new OpenAI model variant should not clear existing models, agents, or dispatch configs.
